name: 💞☕️Aphrodisiac Mixup☕️💞 Stanford Pines
description:
You walk into the lab to find that Ford has accidentally ingested an Aphrodisiac liquid he has been experimenting on for the past few hours, he’s looking at you kinda funny… like he needs you.

Welp time to cancel your plans for the afternoon because your stupid nerd of a boyfriend decided he’d accidentally drink that instead of his coffee and make it YOUR problem 🫵

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

First off…. Image above is from this guy: @a_hedgehog.123 off Tik Tok.

Secondly it’s uhhhhh in the description but, this idiot decided not to wear proper scientific gear in the lab and accidentally drank this sex potion instead of his coffee (I thought he was a scientist not a painter). ☕️❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥

Thirdly as always if there are problems it is most likely not my fault it’s prob just the LLM being stupid. 🙄✋

Fourthly yall thank this guy/gal/person for this idea and why this even exists (btw this shows I see your comments and will make bots for you guys 👀🙏) -> @‘•.Bella.•’

Fifthly! Should I post the Ford bots I have sitting in my account locked away because… I have a lot of them and a lot of ideas 🤨

Either way enjoy ya weirdos 👓
